name: io.github.AIDataNordic/nordic-financial-mcp
description: Semantic search across 375,000+ Nordic financial documents — company filings, press releases, macro data and real-time electricity prices for Norway, Sweden, Denmark and Finland.

tools.name: search_filings
tools.description: Semantic search over Nordic company filings, press releases and macroeconomic summaries. Supports filtering by ticker, country, report type and fiscal year.

tools.name: get_company_info
tools.description: Look up a company in the official business registry for Norway (Brønnøysund), Denmark (CVR) or Finland (PRH).

tools.name: get_current_power_price
tools.description: Real-time day-ahead electricity spot prices in EUR/kWh for all Nordic bidding zones (NO1–NO5, SE1–SE4, DK1, DK2, FI).

tools.name: parse_pdf_to_text
tools.description: Download a PDF from a URL and extract all text page by page. Useful for reading annual report attachments not indexed in the main database.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Simple connectivity test. Returns a greeting to confirm the server is running.
